meta.description: Setup manifest for mazze-lab GitHub Actions → Cloudflare Pages deployment pipeline

prerequisites.label: mazzeleczzare.com DNS managed by Cloudflare
prerequisites.note: Domain must be in a Cloudflare zone for custom domain to work

steps.title: Create Cloudflare Pages project
steps.notes: Run once. If project already exists, skip to step 2.

steps.title: Get Cloudflare Account ID
steps.location: Right sidebar on any zone page, or Workers & Pages overview

steps.title: Create scoped Cloudflare API token
instructions: Use template: 'Edit Cloudflare Workers' OR build custom
If custom: set Permission = 'Cloudflare Pages — Edit'
Set Zone Resources = 'All zones' OR specific zone for mazzeleczzare.com
Click Continue to summary → Create Token
Copy the token immediately — it is shown only once
steps.security_note: Token is scoped to Pages only. Do not use Global API Key.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
secrets.description: Scoped CF API token from step 3

steps.title: Push repository to GitHub
steps.notes: Replace {owner} with your GitHub username. Create the repo on GitHub first (no README, no .gitignore).

steps.title: Add custom domain
steps.url: https://dash.cloudflare.com → Workers & Pages → mazze-lab → Custom domains
instructions: DNS CNAME record is added automatically (mazzeleczzare.com must be in CF)
steps.propagation_time: Usually instant for CF-managed domains; up to 24h for external DNS

workflow_behavior.on_workflow_dispatch: Manual production deployment from Actions UI

troubleshooting.cause: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secret is missing, expired, or has wrong permissions
fix: Confirm secret is set: GitHub → Settings → Secrets → Actions
Confirm token has 'Cloudflare Pages — Edit' permission
Regenerate token at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens if needed

troubleshooting.symptom: Error: A request to the Cloudflare API failed — account not found
fix: Re-check Account ID in CF dashboard right sidebar
Confirm it is a 32-character hex string with no spaces

troubleshooting.cause: wrangler pages project create mazze-lab was not run, or project name mismatch
fix: Run: wrangler pages project create mazze-lab
Confirm project-name in deploy.yml matches exactly: mazze-lab

troubleshooting.cause: Custom domain not added in CF Pages, or DNS not propagated
fix: Check CF dashboard → Workers & Pages → mazze-lab → Custom domains
If domain shows 'Pending', wait up to 24h
If domain not listed, follow step 6 above

troubleshooting.symptom: Fonts or external scripts blocked in browser console
troubleshooting.cause: Content-Security-Policy in wrangler.toml does not allow the origin
fix: Edit wrangler.toml [[headers]] CSP to add the required origin
Example: add https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com to script-src if using CDN scripts

troubleshooting.symptom: Action fails: src/ directory not found
troubleshooting.cause: Committed without the src/ directory, or wrong branch
fix: Confirm src/index.html exists in your repo
Run: git status — ensure src/ is tracked and committed
